overview: Aditya University, Surampalem, is a state private university in Kakinada district that officially states it was established in 2024 under the Andhra Pradesh Private Universities Act, 2016 and evolved from the long-running Aditya Engineering College campus. The university presents itself as a multidisciplinary institution with schools of Engineering, Business, Pharmacy, and Sciences, built on the wider Aditya educational group's academic and industry ecosystem.
accreditation: UGC recognized under Section 2(f); NAAC A++; 6 UG engineering programs accredited by NBA under Tier-I; approvals on the official site include AICTE and PCI as applicable; NIRF 151-200 band reference published on official university pages.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech - Agricultural, Civil, CSE, CSE (AI and ML), CSE (Data Science), ECE, EEE, IT, Mechanical, Mining, Petroleum
M.Tech - Structural Engineering, Power Electronics and Drives, Energy Science and Technology, VLSI Design, CSE, CSE (AI and ML)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Varies by program; confirm with admissions
Published public sources list MBA around Rs. 1.20 lakh total and MCA around Rs. 69,800 total
Official admissions site lists the programs; fee details are handled through the admissions desk

coursesAndFees.program: B.Sc / M.Sc - Forensic Science, Cyber Security and Digital Forensics; Ph.D programs

placements.placementRate: 100% placement assistance for registered and eligible students
placements.internationalOffers: 100+ companies listed as international/industry-connect on the official admissions portal

admissions.admissionProcess: The official admissions portal accepts registrations for undergraduate and postgraduate programs, while AP EAPCET, AP ICET, and AP PGECET/GATE are used for the relevant state counseling and PG admissions. The university also runs direct admissions help desks for management, global, and other categories.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions are open through the official portal, while AP EAPCET, AP ICET, and AP PGECET schedules are published each cycle by APSCHE and the respective admission authorities.

facilities: Engineering, business, pharmacy, and science schools
campus.specialNote: Official university pages highlight 33+ functional MoUs, 250+ patents, 1200+ research publications, and government-funded sponsored projects worth about Rs. 16.3 crore.

contact.address: Aditya Nagar, ADB Road, Surampalem, Kakinada District - 533437, Andhra Pradesh, India
